# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/arm64-v8a/SDL_mixer
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//No help, variable specified on the command line.

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ANDROID_PLATFORM:UNINITIALIZED=android-24

//Build the library as a shared library
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//Build tests
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/llvm-addr2line

//Archiver
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/llvm-ar

//ASM-ATT compiler
CMAKE_ASM-ATT_COMPILER:STRING=/usr/bin/as

//Flags used by the ASM-ATT compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM-ATT_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM-ATT compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM-ATT_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM-ATT compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.

//Flags used by the ASM-ATT compiler during RELEASE builds.

//Flags used by the ASM-ATT compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.

//LLVM archiver

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner

//Generate index for LLVM archive

//Flags used by the compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the compiler during debug builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the compiler during release builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang-scan-deps

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/llvm-ranlib

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Enable to build Debian packages
CPACK_BINARY_DEB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build FreeBSD packages
CPACK_BINARY_FREEBSD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build IFW packages
CPACK_BINARY_IFW:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build NSIS packages
CPACK_BINARY_NSIS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build RPM packages
CPACK_BINARY_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build STGZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_STGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TBZ2 packages
CPACK_BINARY_TBZ2:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TGZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_TGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TXZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_TXZ:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_TZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build RPM source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TBZ2 source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TBZ2:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TGZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TXZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TXZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build ZIP source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_ZIP:BOOL=OFF

//Git command line client
GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Git.
Git_DIR:PATH=Git_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Install documentation
INSTALL_DOCS:BOOL=ON

//Install ogg.pc file
INSTALL_PKG_CONFIG_MODULE:BOOL=ON

//additional software error checking.
OPUS_ASSERTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//build programs.
OPUS_BUILD_PROGRAMS:BOOL=OFF

//build shared library.
OPUS_BUILD_SHARED_LIBRARY:BOOL=OFF

//build tests.
OPUS_BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=OFF

//enable bit-exactness checks between optimized and c implementations.
OPUS_CHECK_ASM:BOOL=OFF

//enable non-Opus modes, e.g. 44.1 kHz & 2^n frames.
OPUS_CUSTOM_MODES:BOOL=OFF

//disable all intrinsics optimizations.
OPUS_DISABLE_INTRINSICS:BOOL=OFF

//compile with the floating point API (for machines with float
// library).
OPUS_ENABLE_FLOAT_API:BOOL=ON

//compile as fixed-point (for machines without a fast enough FPU).
OPUS_FIXED_POINT:BOOL=OFF

//enable floating point approximations (Ensure your platform supports
// IEEE 754 before enabling).
OPUS_FLOAT_APPROX:BOOL=OFF

//add protection against buffer overflows.
OPUS_FORTIFY_SOURCE:BOOL=ON

//causes the encoder to make random decisions (do not use in production).
OPUS_FUZZING:BOOL=OFF

//run-time checks that are cheap and safe for use in production.
OPUS_HARDENING:BOOL=ON

//install CMake package config module.
OPUS_INSTALL_CMAKE_CONFIG_MODULE:BOOL=ON

//install pkg-config module.
OPUS_INSTALL_PKG_CONFIG_MODULE:BOOL=ON

//Does runtime check for neon support
OPUS_MAY_HAVE_NEON:BOOL=ON

//Assume target CPU has NEON support
OPUS_PRESUME_NEON:BOOL=OFF

//use stack protection.
OPUS_STACK_PROTECTOR:BOOL=ON

//Option to enable NEON
OPUS_USE_NEON:BOOL=ON

//use variable length arrays for stack arrays.
OPUS_VAR_ARRAYS:BOOL=ON

//Disable floating-point API
OP_DISABLE_FLOAT_API:BOOL=OFF

//Enable assertions in code
OP_ENABLE_ASSERTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable fixed-point calculation
OP_FIXED_POINT:BOOL=OFF

OpusFile_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/arm64-v8a/SDL_mixer/external/opusfile

Opus_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_mixer/external/opus

//Support an external music player
SDL2MIXER_CMD:BOOL=ON

//Name suffix for debug builds
SDL2MIXER_DEBUG_POSTFIX:STRING=d

//Default value for loading dependencies dynamically
SDL2MIXER_DEPS_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//Enable FLAC music
SDL2MIXER_FLAC:BOOL=ON

//Enable FLAC music using drflac
SDL2MIXER_FLAC_DRFLAC:BOOL=ON

//Enable FLAC music using libFLAC
SDL2MIXER_FLAC_LIBFLAC:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading GME music via game-music-emu
SDL2MIXER_GME:BOOL=OFF

//Dynamically load libgme
SDL2MIXER_GME_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//Enable SDL2mixer install target
SDL2MIXER_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

//Enable MIDI music
SDL2MIXER_MIDI:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading MOD music
SDL2MIXER_MOD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable MP3 music
SDL2MIXER_MP3:BOOL=ON

//Support loading MP3 music via minimp3
SDL2MIXER_MP3_MINIMP3:BOOL=ON

//Support loading MP3 music via MPG123
SDL2MIXER_MP3_MPG123:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Opus music
SDL2MIXER_OPUS:BOOL=ON

//Dynamically load libopus
SDL2MIXER_OPUS_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//Build the SDL2_mixer sample program(s)
SDL2MIXER_SAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Use vendored third-party libraries
SDL2MIXER_VENDORED:BOOL=ON

//Enable OGG Vorbis music
SDL2MIXER_VORBIS:STRING=STB

//Enable streaming WAVE music
SDL2MIXER_WAVE:BOOL=ON

//Enable WavPack music
SDL2MIXER_WAVPACK:BOOL=ON

//Enable WavPack DSD music support
SDL2MIXER_WAVPACK_DSD:BOOL=OFF

//Dynamically load WavPack library
SDL2MIXER_WAVPACK_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
SDL2_DIR:UNINITIALIZED=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-install/arm64-v8a/SDL/lib/cmake/SDL2

//Value Computed by CMake

//Value Computed by CMake
SDL2_mixer_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_mixer

//Location where to install SDL2_mixerConfig.cmake
SDLMIXER_INSTALL_CMAKEDIR:STRING=lib/cmake/SDL2_mixer

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Threads.
Threads_DIR:PATH=Threads_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Enable support for WavPack DSD files
WAVPACK_ENABLE_DSD:BOOL=ON

//Decode legacy (< 4.0) WavPack files
WAVPACK_ENABLE_LEGACY:BOOL=OFF

//Prefer iconv() from libiconv, if available, over libc version
WAVPACK_ENABLE_LIBICONV:BOOL=OFF

//Generate and install CMake package configuration module
WAVPACK_INSTALL_CMAKE_MODULE:BOOL=OFF

//Install documentation
WAVPACK_INSTALL_DOCS:BOOL=OFF

//Generate and install wavpack.pc
WAVPACK_INSTALL_PKGCONFIG_MODULE:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
WavPack_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/arm64-v8a/SDL_mixer/external/wavpack

//Detected architecture ARM32
WavPack_CPU_ARM32:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture ARM64
WavPack_CPU_ARM64:BOOL=1

//Detected architecture ARM64EC
WavPack_CPU_ARM64EC:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture EMSCRIPTEN
WavPack_CPU_EMSCRIPTEN:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture LOONGARCH64
WavPack_CPU_LOONGARCH64:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture POWERPC32
WavPack_CPU_POWERPC32:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture POWERPC64
WavPack_CPU_POWERPC64:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture X64
WavPack_CPU_X64:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture X86
WavPack_CPU_X86:BOOL=0

opus_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;m;

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS

CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_WORKS:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=28
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake executable.
CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cpack
//Path to ctest program executable.
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/ctest

INT16_SIZE:INTERNAL=2

INT32_SIZE:INTERNAL=4

INT64_SIZE:INTERNAL=8

INT_SIZE:INTERNAL=4

W_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=1

Wall_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=1
